latest_news.headline: Iran strikes Israeli Haifa oil refinery — first hit on Israeli energy infrastructure
latest_news.text: Iranian missile hits Haifa oil refinery. Energy Minister Cohen says 'no significant damage' reported. First Iranian strike on Israeli energy infrastructure — reciprocal escalation after Israel hit South Pars.

latest_news.headline: Iranian drone crashes into Saudi Samref refinery in Yanbu — oil loading briefly halted
latest_news.text: Iranian drone crashes into Samref refinery (Yanbu). Oil loading halted briefly, resumed after hours. Ballistic missile also intercepted heading toward port. Saudi Arabia intercepts 3 drones in eastern region same day.

latest_news.headline: Israeli officials confirm South Pars attack was coordinated with US — contradicting Trump
latest_news.text: Three Israeli officials tell Reuters South Pars attack was coordinated with Washington. Trump's public denial described as recurring pattern after fuel depot strikes weeks ago. Hegseth also repeats 'we knew nothing'.

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, 968+ killed in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli warplanes destroy bridges over Litani River linking south Lebanon to rest of country. Death toll reaches 968+ (up from 912). Over 1 million displaced. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes.

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.headline: US-Russia-Ukraine peace talks formally paused due to Iran war
latest_news.text: No progress on Ukraine peace since Putin-Trump call (Mar 18). US diplomatic bandwidth consumed by Iran war. Russia benefits from oil price surge reducing economic pressure.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

top_signals: F-35 makes emergency landing in Iran after combat mission — IRGC claims it was hit, CENTCOM confirms landing and pilot in stable condition
Lebanon death toll surpasses 1,000 (118+ children, 2,500+ wounded) since Mar 2 — Al Jazeera confirms milestone
Hezbollah mounts stiff ground resistance in 3 strategic areas of south Lebanon, slowing Israeli advance
Netanyahu: Israel will halt further strikes on South Pars at Trump's request — key de-escalatory signal
Netanyahu claims Iran 'can no longer enrich uranium or make ballistic missiles' — unverified
Brent crude briefly surges above $119/barrel — up 60% since war began
Arab League condemns Iranian attacks on Gulf energy sites as 'dangerous escalation'
Iran continues intense Gulf strikes: Kuwait refineries, Saudi SAMREF, Abu Dhabi gas, vessels ablaze off UAE
Pentagon requests $200B+ supplemental war funding — open-ended war posture
QatarEnergy: 17% global LNG capacity cut for up to 5 years, force majeure declared

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: WATCH: Day 20 Hour 22. No material changes from last scan. US-Israel alignment visibly fraying over targeting (South Pars). Netanyahu's 'acted alone' statement + Trump's 'halt' order = strategic divergence. Key question: does Israel comply? Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire holding through Mar 23. Energy crisis: Brent ~$119, Qatar 17% LNG offline. All signals stable.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu: Israel 'acted alone' on South Pars, denies dragging US into war
latest_news.text: Netanyahu says Israel 'acted alone' in striking South Pars gasfield. Trump asked Israel to hold off on future attacks. Netanyahu claims Iran has 'no ability to enrich uranium at the moment'. US-Israel friction on war aims visible.

latest_news.headline: Lebanon death toll 1,000+, 1M displaced, possible war crimes under review
latest_news.source: The Guardian / Sky News / Al Jazeera
latest_news.text: Over 1,000 killed (118+ children), 2,500+ wounded in Lebanon since Mar 2. 1M+ displaced. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes. Hezbollah still resisting in 3 strategic areas of south Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: China condemns Israeli killings of Iranian officials, opposes use of force
latest_news.text: China MFA spokesperson condemns Israeli military 'authorized to kill any Iranian official'. China firmly opposes use of force in international relations. Killing of Iranian leaders and attacks on civilian targets 'by no means acceptable'.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 22:04 UTC) — Hourly scan: No major changes. (1) Netanyahu confirms Israel 'acted alone' on South Pars, denies dragging US into war; Trump asked Israel to halt energy strikes — signal already tracked (israel_acted_alone_south_pars, trump_halt_israel_energy_strikes). (2) Netanyahu claims Iran has 'no ability to enrich uranium' — supports enrichment_destroyed signal. (3) Lebanon death toll 1,000+, ground invasion continues with Hezbollah resistance in 3 areas. (4) Brent near $119, energy crisis deepening. (5) Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23. (6) No new conflict zones detected. (7) All tracker signals stable — no additions or removals this cycle.
